a.xlink:title: Defines a procedural step in dungeon generation.
Spawns treasure items (coins and gold) at random locations in the dungeon.
Spawns weapons (swords and double swords) at random locations in the dungeon.
Generates a central room in the dungeon.
Generates multiple random chamber rooms in the dungeon.
Fills the entire dungeon with floor tiles, creating an empty open space.
Fills the entire dungeon with wall tiles, creating a solid base for carving.
Generates corridors connecting all rooms to a central room.
